title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the README.md file to include an author section with relevant details.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end or in a logical place (such as after the project description or before license information). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or links (e.g., GitHub profile, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Visually inspect the README.md file in both a markdown editor and on GitHub to confirm the author section appears correctly, is clearly labeled, and contains accurate information. Optionally, run markdown linting tools to check for formatting issues.
